reviews.review_description: I really love Theater Elsewhere, but I seem not to be able to load any content anymore. I've tried several options, like rebooting, re-installing, checking my internet connection etc. but I keep getting the same error message. Can I get some help to fix this?

Please add hand tracking 😃
It's a great app, I recommend you to give it a try. People could pay for this and we have it for free, and that's amazing.
Only thing is it lacks is a search engine. 
Also if you're pro hand tracking you might want to ask for it in your review too.
I want to animate
I couldn’t get anything to open.

Overall this was a good app and I liked the bookmarking and everything else they were good I just ask that you add a search bar I want to search up movies I want to see rather than watching the most popular or most recent cuz then I wouldn’t watch the middle but overall once again it is a good app to use.

reviews.review_title: You can get lost in this app for hours
reviews.review_description: This is one of my personal favorites, providing an exceptionally immersive and enjoyable experience while you sit and observe the remarkable creations.

i mean this is just brutal the there's so much potential there's so much beauty in this but it's just random. upload a video you take probably months and months to create it and no one can find it why?

App is completely broken. Content failed to load errors no matter what I choose. Has been broken for months! Tried uninstalling and reinstalling. Tried clearing cache. Tried shaking voodoo chicken bones over my headset. It's just busted. Multiple people are reporting this. Nothing's being done. Thanks!
Videos look so good! If only games looked like this
I tried to open the app since it tends to be very calming and just a nice escape but it says failed to open and no matter what i do it won’t open
Great ap.  I have gone through several stories and really enjoyed.  Wonderful art.   Nice for some quiet time
Ok

reviews.review_title: BEAUTIFUL SUBVERSIVE WORLD OF LIVE ART
reviews.review_description: I think this app was a beautiful escape. You could just smile through countless live 3D videos and art. I’ve spent a lot of time in this app.

I like this game so much even though I haven't saw it it looks good in VR so thank you so much I give it 10 out of 10 thank you so much whoever created this game I rate them five stars 🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩🤩
It’s so real with perfect VR experience. Felt like in a dream

I love this app I watched it all day and if I could I would watch it 3 days strai…
More
I was blown away by VR technology. This was one of the first apps I downloaded...it delivers...take your time and explore...especially in the narrative section. Wow!

This is by far the only good meta app. it is the only default app on a quest that i wouldn't uninstall if i could. It's definitely worth taking some time to check out some of the videos on this.

Do it while you still can, because judging based on their track record meta would likely delete all of the vr content off of it and make it the 18th way to watch Netflix soon.
This was preinstalled on my Meta quest 3S but I’ve never been able to use it which is a shame as it sounds very interesting, every time I start it just says content failed to load. A pity

reviews.review_title: If I could give it 6 stars I would
reviews.review_description: Some of the shows had me blown away by how much lore they have. In my five years of having VR, idk how I haven't found out about this app sooner. This app is definitely one of the best apps for people trying out VR  for the first time.

reviews.review_title: In short one of my go to apps
reviews.review_description: Im surprised just how much I enjoy using this app as im generally not into "arty" type stuff but there is some real treasure here if your willing to dig a bit with some amazing visuals and very creative animations. Even the home screen is visually stunning (especially when using quest games optimiser). Im not a gamer so this is exactly the kinda stuff im looking for to relax and unwind using my Q3. My only wish is to provide a categories section to assist with finding content as currently I need to remember the page where I left off from my last visit as I continue to scroll through all the current pages.
Got a quest for xmas.  This don't load at all

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the comment and feedback. If you are experiencing "Content failed to load" issue, you could resolve it by turning on Facebook's integration with apps, games and websites setting, following the instructions below:

facebook.com/help/211829542181913/

reviews.review_description:
This is one of the Best App to view 3D content and Art!
Im surprised by how the 3D look in this app. It Feel like Disney style of content and entertainment come to life !!!
This is actually my very favorite thing to check out in VR. The experience is amazing being submerged in different environments and art.
A little boring, but a cool concept

I’m pretty sure some people will by a quest 3 & only use this app alone.
Very good.

It’s absurd that there’s no search feature in this. I started watching NightMara about 6 months ago, but never bothered to finish because finding each subsequent episode is a ridiculous pain in rear. 
And it’s not a great experience when an episode exits to a black screen and no buttons will return you to the app’s main menu. There’s no excuse for what is essentially just a collection of videos to be this hard to navigate.

developer_response.body:
You can find NightMara easily in the narratives category.
The "b" button will take you back to the discovery wall as shown in the tutorial.

Very cool, and after seeing these awesome creations I want to try myself!
Some are videos, some are just animated scenes with different camera angles. It's so very cool.

Love this I could spend loads of time in this place never fails to amaze me and Soda Island is very cool and interesting and keeps me amused for ages well done to all the artists who have contributed keep doing what you’re doing it’s fantastic!! 🤩😍😜😘😘
I played this on my VR and I loved it so much it was really fun to do! I really want to try it myself but I don't know if I'll be able to do it :(

Why are you a hater because theater elsewhere. in is just people create, watch, design movies, what is wrong with you?? Are you being selfish for real. Like stop lil bro fr dang. Like they always hate and put one star.

reviews.review_title: Maybe good, maybe not. I don't care.
reviews.review_description: Stop force installing this useless stuff on my device. If I wanted it I would download it myself.
This game was sooo mesmerizing, the stories the different animations it's a peaceful vr experience if your looking for a story book world to hide in.

Theatre elsewhere is one of the best platforms on Meta - great to see a range of animators on one platform and simply hours of fun to be had. Well done to the creators and all of the animators who post on the site.

reviews.review_title: Wow this is a MUST PLAY!!
reviews.review_description:
Usually I think this "cartoony" graphics are just a limitation of the Quest and are a bit overused BUT THIS is just amazing wow.

- Crisp Colorful Smooth experience it feels so good
- Beautiful Sound Design on most movies 
- Quite emotional and touching

This is one of my go to apps to show people VR!
Ain’t nothin to do here 💀
This a fantastic app 👌👌👌

" what a wonderfull World"!!!! Congratulations to the dev' and all artists publishing in it.
Please, make a  "share" section for a better social deal. Big thanks
Hours and hours of great stuff. Soda Island is incredible! Would be a 5 star if content would be added/ updated more often. But absolutely amazing otherwise

reviews.review_title: This is a new type of entertainment
reviews.review_description: It’s not just watching a show in vr, or playing a game, it’s media designed to be a 360 experience, so much variety from different creators, I hope this is the future of entertainment
The first day I got it I was just like ok nice nice but now it is just amazing like outstanding and the graphics are amazing so just try it if
It’s good but I wish the program with which you make animations with isn’t only on PC.
Animations I recommend:Nightmara ep 2,3,Nyssa,Rebelsand the school trip:Tales from soda islands
There is some very cool art by very talented artists in this app with new animations being added all the time.
Every animation is breathtaking
First review I’ve ever done. It’s such a nice experience living and watching through another person’s art.

The lobby with portals showing different environments looks promising. Update - Turning on Facebook's integration with apps, games and website settings fixed the problem. Thanks Developers!

How bonkers app is pegi 3
Супер

reviews.review_title: My favorite app so far for 2025!
reviews.review_description:
New to Metaquest and this was the first app I wanted to download.  Thankful that I did!

Love the fact that you can switch diff positions during the stories, scenes, etc.

Very entertaining, but also very calming when you need to escape reality for a bit.
I love this app! Let’s just say it is what I always wanted VR to be. You have so many different ways to view the pieces. If you like exploration- you will also love this app.

This and Scoreboards (RIP), are the best pre installed apps that Meta have done :)



Speaking of which, can you plz bring back the scoreboards app plz? I was one of the many people that used it.
Art is everywhere and most people do have the app

This is my favorite app for the Quest. It is truly open art at its best. 

Each artist's creation is unique and enjoyable. It's like walking through a gallery, but better. The ability to fly through and fully experience all the work that's went into each piece is breathtaking. I am so thankful to have discovered this early in my Quest journey, and happy to see new content all the time. 

Thank you to all the great artists that bring this all to life! You are a very talented group.
love it thanks for creating this.
Soda island just go fu**ing watch it it is so good dam good

Theater Elsewhere is the latest incarnation of the native Quest app for 3d animations and and short animated stories. I’ve loved the app since Quest 1 and this version takes it over the top!  So many of the issues I’ve had have been fixed. At last I can see all of my saved animations in an easy access format. Search is improved and we can access creator’s collections again directly. Good job!!! 👏 👏 

Only thing I’d love to see added is the ability to save animations directly to headset storage for instant access.  Maybe a way to connect to other headsets so we can share our favorites together with others.  

Spend some time in this app! So much to discover!!
I love this app, but there is no search option I can find, to search for previous clips, I forgot to save. It’s great app

developer_response.body:
If you remember the creator name you can click on the profile image on a content tile to see all the work from a specific creator. 

Alternatively you can use meta quest tv to search and save content.

reviews.review_description: It's a amazing experience ❤️
I cannot express how beautiful this app is. The amazing journeys it takes us on. I love it and it brings so much joy! Visually breathtaking!!
it is very boring and it has laots of bugs the games are not fun you can do better play any other game just not this

EDIT: No longer the case! (see below). This is an issue that has dogged animations playback since Oculus Go days and I'm so grateful to the developers that it has finally been fixed. That's what you call responsive! Fantastic work, thank you.


PREVIOUS REVIEW: I love VR animations and quillustrations and am very happy with the revamp of Theater Elsewhere, great job. But there is still an awkward issue with visible controllers. If you hold them in your hands while watching an animation they are in the visible line of sight. If you put them down, they wake/sleep and drift in front of your face. Is there any solution being put forward for this? If you want to showcase an animation to someone and give them the headset, you literally have to remove the batteries from the controllers so that this doesn't happen to ruin their experience.

developer_response.body: We are glad to hear from you, and that you enjoy this application and the hand painted animations. We will keep improving this application to bring more features to it.

reviews.review_title: Not ordered and yet has appeared
reviews.review_description:
What is this? I've not ordered it nor do I want it. 
Auto install as well which I stopped. 
Very dodgy..........reported

developer_response.body: Theater Elsewhere is an immersive media app by Meta formerly known as VR Animation Player which is similar to Meta Quest TV. It is free and comes preinstalled with every headset.

reviews.review_description: Auto installed on to my vr, don’t know why. Sus 🤨

developer_response.body: Theater Elsewhere is an immersive media app by Meta formerly known as VR Animation Player which is similar to Meta Quest TV. It is free and comes preinstalled with every headset.

reviews.review_description: Useless app that once again, meta forces onto headsets.
I wish u can make ur own creations

developer_response.body: You can contribute using Quill by Smoothstep and uploading IMM files via Meta Quest Media Studio. Quill by Smoothstep is a PC VR app that you can use for free via Meta Quest Link or Air Link.

reviews.review_title: Incredible, Meta really ought to boost
reviews.review_description: The availability of Quill, and the ability to create full 3D animations much less behold them and become inspired all over, is the reason I bought the mqpro. *Please, Meta, embrace this new way of making animation - the only mistake is letting this, or Quill or equivalent software "go". There is something substantive every animation, all the talented indie animators on the platform and that is incredible, as an animator. Id be sad to witness money not go to support more animation,  animation genres, you are sitting on an animation revolution. As for anyone with a headset, this is where some of the most incredible animation ideas I've ever seen is, and the creativity in these vr animations all comes from a place part 2d, part 3d, part stop motion, and 100 percent authentic animation in a way I never thought could bridge 2d, 3d and immersion in art that moves.
This sucks
It's working good but it always suggests me the same videos while I'm sure there's way more to see...

Not working on Quest 3!
Fix it !

developer_response.body: We issued a fix today. If it still doesn't work, make sure to restart your device.
